body:
'gittoc list' currently supports filtering by state (-s) and label (-l) but not by owner or priority. Common agent/team queries include 'what is alice working on?' and 'show me p1 open bugs'. Add:

  --owner NAME      keep tickets with owner=NAME (repeatable for OR)
  -p/--priority N   keep tickets with priority=N (repeatable for OR)

Both combine as AND with existing -s/-l filters, mirroring the current label-AND semantics only within each filter dimension.
title: list: add --owner and --priority filters
